_comment: Reference for the runtime-configurable settings. In the app these are set in the in-app Settings screen and persisted with Jetpack DataStore (NOT this file, NOT SharedPreferences) — see the Phase 3-4 spec in android/DESIGN.md. This file documents the keys, options, and defaults. Hard rule: no tracking/telemetry/ads, and no outbound network except to the sync/OCR targets the user explicitly selects.

sync._abstraction: All options implement ONE StorageProvider interface (one impl per backend) so targets can be swapped/added without rewiring. Switchable at runtime, choice persisted, nothing hardcoded.

local_folder._doc: DEFAULT. App writes exports into a SAF-granted folder (ACTION_OPEN_DOCUMENT_TREE + takePersistableUriPermission). A separate folder-sync app (Syncthing, Nextcloud, FolderSync) you run watches that folder. The app does NOT drive the sync app.

tailscale_push._doc: App POSTs each export over HTTP(S) to this NAS endpoint on your tailnet. Unreachable => queue + retry, never lose the export.

local_only._doc: Exports stay on-device. For testing. No contextual field.

sync._cloud_doc: Cloud providers below are allowed targets the user explicitly selects. Their per-provider auth, least-privilege OAuth scopes, secret storage, and setup are NOT specified in the dropdowns doc I currently have — DO NOT invent them. The master brief points to the Settings/dropdowns implementation order for that spec; needed before building cloud providers.

google_drive._auth: PENDING SPEC (OAuth, least-privilege scope, token storage)

nas_watcher._doc: DEFAULT. App makes NO OCR calls. It only exports cleanly and tags each file (sidecar) with page ID, notebook/Ncode ID, pen ID, capture timestamp. A separate NAS watcher service (out of this app's scope) does the OCR. Do not build the watcher here.

in_app._doc: After export, a background worker POSTs the page image to this endpoint and stores the returned transcript beside the page.
in_app.verbatimPrompt: Transcribe the handwriting in this image EXACTLY as written. Do not correct spelling, grammar, or word choice. Do not add commentary or reasoning. Output only the verbatim transcription.
in_app._qwen_note: For Qwen3-VL also disable thinking leakage (equivalent of --hidethinking); it tends to leak reasoning and silently correct text.

export._formats_doc: SVG preserves stroke vectors. Idempotent: re-exporting a page does not duplicate/corrupt; failed exports retry (no page loss). Run export/sync/OCR as WorkManager jobs.

sidecar._doc: Sidecar (or embedded) metadata written next to each export; consumed by NAS-watcher mode.

firmware._note: Off by default. Firmware updates are left to the occasional official-app run (master brief).
